name: TCIL_ControlInit
title: TCIL_ControlInit
description: This function can only be used in on preStart, to suppress the auto-start function of the IL.
If the device name is not specified, the node attributes with the device name must be defined (Exception: If NMT is not active, the device name is not needed).

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: TC simulation node to apply the function.
